description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical plastic water bottle with a clear, transparent body and a blue screw cap. The bottle features a wide, smooth label wrapped around its midsection, displaying branding and product information in blue and gray tones. The body of the bottle is slightly contoured with horizontal ridges for grip and structural integrity. The neck of the bottle is narrow and tapers upward, topped with a small, round cap. The label covers a significant portion of the bottle's central area, with text and graphics visible from all sides. The bottle appears to be empty, as the interior is clear and no liquid is visible.
description: A tall, clear plastic water bottle with a blue screw cap and a wide, blue-gray label around its center. The bottle is contoured with horizontal ridges and appears empty.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with branding and product details clearly visible, blue cap on top.
description_view_1: Side view with the label's side panel visible, showing additional text and graphics, blue cap remains prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the label, likely with nutritional or product information, bottle contours visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more label text and a clear view of the bottle's ridged structure and blue cap.
attribute_label_or_branding: A wide, rectangular label wraps around the bottle's center, predominantly blue and gray with white text. The label features branding, product name, and additional information in a clean, modern font. The label covers about one-third of the bottle's height and is centered horizontally.
attribute_cap_type: Screw cap; small, round, and blue in color with a smooth finish and slight ridges for grip.
attribute_transparency: The bottle is fully transparent, allowing clear visibility of the interior and label through the plastic. No patterns or gradients in transparency are present.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: The neck is narrow, cylindrical, and tapers smoothly upward from the body. It features external threading for the screw cap and a slight flare at the transition to the main body.
